title: Stability — env-wide investigation sweep
prompt: Run an environment-wide sweep — anything weird going on in the last hour anywhere in the env? Quote actual top movers (positive or negative drift) by name. If nothing's moving, say so honestly.
persona: Oncall SRE doing a periodic 'is everything OK' scan.
budget_hint: 2-4 tool calls; investigate(starting_point=environment) is the right entry.

expected_answer.summary: Environment-wide investigation should run cleanly and surface either growth/decline drivers OR a truthful-negative. Top movers from oracle: open_telemetry_opentelemetry_collector_contrib_exporter_opensearchexporter, opentelemetry_io_collector_processor_batchprocessor_v_batch_processor_go, cart_cartstore_ValkeyCartStore.
